title: DC-15 (disambiguation)
content:
'''DC-15''' was a series of [[Grand Army of the Republic]] [[blaster]]s that were standard-issue for the [[clone trooper]]s. Like all standard blaster weapons, these guns created a charged plasma bolt using a small amount of [[tibanna]] gas.
[[File:DC-15_Phase_I_Trooper_SWL.png|thumb|right|250px|A Phase I Clone trooper firing a DC-15 blaster rifle]]
